questions.question: Describe the concept of commission in the context of a database management system. Provide an example to illustrate your answer.
questions.hint: Give a clear and concise definition of commission, and explain its relevance in database management.

questions.question: What is the purpose of the commission table in a database management system? Provide a brief explanation of its columns and relationships.
questions.hint: Focus on the key aspects of the commission table and its role in the database.

questions.question: A company has a commission-based sales structure, where sales representatives earn a commission of 10% on each sale. If a sales representative makes a sale worth $1000, how much commission will they earn? Explain your answer and show the calculations.
questions.hint: Use the given commission rate and sale amount to calculate the commission earned by the sales representative.
